terminology.block_position: presentation order position shown to the participant
terminology.condition_id: runtime condition assigned to a block; this preview uses the locked factor-coded VR condition ID
terminology.vr_condition_id: locked factor-coded VR particle condition ID
terminology.coherence_level: low or high movement coherence factor level
terminology.energy_noise_level: low or high movement energy/noise factor level
terminology.counterbalance_order_id: mapping from block positions to counterbalanced conditions

preview_transfer_note: Browser preview state is a layout and fixture artifact only. The Polar strip is a visual/native-state preview; native Android/Compose request parsing, H10 validation, result writing, focus, and headset validation remain authoritative.

questionnaire_item_library.naming_rule: Use namespaced dot ids for nested JSON paths and flat snake_case variable_name values for exports/spreadsheets.

items.label: Polar H10 ECG validation
items.validation: native ready only when HR/RR stream, PMD, ECG stream, samples, and 130 Hz are present

items.label: Language
items.validation: required; must be en or de

items.label: Full name
items.validation: derived from first and last name

items.label: Handedness
items.validation: required; must be one handedness option id

items.label: Gender
items.validation: required; must be one gender option id

items.label: Consent text
items.default: I consent to participate in this study.
items.validation: fixed consent wording shown to participant

items.label: Counterbalance order assignment
items.validation: assigned by the study runner from accumulated allocation counts; must be one of counterbalance order ids

items.label: Active condition index
items.validation: derived from the current block position; must be 1..4

items.label: VR task instructions
items.validation: native app/caller owns induction timing, media, task state, completion, counterbalanced condition order, and randomized audio variant

items.label: Active assessment page
items.validation: derived from questionnaire workflow navigation; must be one of assessment page ids

items.label: Retrospective Self-Assessment Manikin pictograph valence
items.question: How pleasant did this experience feel?

items.label: Retrospective Self-Assessment Manikin pictograph dominance/control
items.question: How much control did you feel during your experience?

items.label: Retrospective valence VAS
items.question: How pleasant did the previous experience feel?
items.validation: required integer 0..100; slider must be touched once before page completion

items.label: Retrospective arousal VAS
items.question: How activated did you feel in the previous experience?
items.validation: required integer 0..100; slider must be touched once before page completion

items.label: Adapted VEQ hand ownership

question.en: It felt like the virtual hands were my own hands.
question.de: Es fühlte sich so an, als wären die virtuellen Hände meine eigenen Hände.

items.source_scale: Adapted single-item Virtual Embodiment Questionnaire (VEQ) ownership/agency measures for virtual hands

items.label: Adapted VEQ hand agency

question.en: It felt like I was controlling the movements of the virtual hands.
question.de: Es fühlte sich so an, als würde ich die Bewegungen der virtuellen Hände kontrollieren.

items.source_scale: Adapted single-item Virtual Embodiment Questionnaire (VEQ) ownership/agency measures for virtual hands

polar_validation.native_ready_rule: streaming && heart_rate_bpm > 0 && rr_interval_count > 0 && pmd_ready && ecg_streaming && ecg_sample_count > 0 && ecg_sample_rate_hz == 130

demographics.consent_text: I consent to participate in this study.

counterbalance.assignment_policy: study runner/data logging assigns each participant to the least-filled counterbalance order from accumulated allocation counts; each order maps factor-coded VR conditions onto block positions

audio_instruction_randomization.assignment_policy: randomly shuffle the four audio instruction variants so each runtime block receives one variant

preview_assignments.assignment_mode: runtime-randomized across the four blocks; preview shows a representative variant
